---
title: "Tools & Applications"
---

A collection of open-source tools developed for forest inventory analysis,
data quality validation, and spatial decision-support. Each tool is available
as a distribution package — see individual repository links below.

::: {.callout-note}
**Distribution repositories are under construction.** The tools are functional
but the public repos and download links are not yet active. Check back soon,
or [open a GitHub Issue](https://github.com/rinecology) to be notified.
:::


---

## JavaScript Applications

### ForestUnit JS — Ontario Forest Unit Analysis Tool

![](images/screenshots/forest-unit.png)

**Description:**  
SQL-style forest unit assignment running 100% in the browser — no server, no
installation. Ships with 7 bundled YAML rule sets (122+ rules): NER Boreal
(TN021 2006, 2017–2019, ROD2023, SRNV2023, SRNV SPCOMP ONLY, SRNV2024) and
GLSL SFU v1.03.01.23. Parses raw SPCOMP strings, assigns SFUs, and produces
CSV + HTML reports. Key feature: cross-rule-set comparison mode with a
diverging bar chart showing area delta vs a chosen baseline. ~330KB bundle,
works offline.

**Tech:** JavaScript (ES2020+), Vite, Chart.js  
**Live Demo:** [rinecology.github.io/forest-unit-js/](https://rinecology.github.io/forest-unit-js/)  
**Source:** Hosted in this portfolio repo under `/forest-unit-js/`

---

## R / Shiny Applications

### Forest Classification Analyzer

![](images/screenshots/forest-unit-shiny.png)

**Description:**  
R/Shiny companion to ForestUnit JS, built for batch and multi-scenario work.
Killer feature: simultaneously compare 2–5 classification scenarios side-by-side
with confusion matrices, agreement analysis, and area impact assessment —
immediately surface which records disagree and why. Supports NER, NWR, and
GLSL regions; SFU, FMG, and PLANFU output types; First/Best/All Match modes.
Accepts CSV, DBF, and Shapefile uploads up to 500 MB. Custom YAML upload
enables testing experimental rule sets before committing them.

**Tech:** R, Shiny  
**Version:** 1.0.0  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/forest-unit-shiny-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/forest-unit-shiny-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo

---

### LOGIC_CHECKER — Forest Inventory Data Quality Reporting System

![](images/screenshots/logic-checker.png)

**Description:**  
Comprehensive validation and reporting system for Ontario forest inventory data
(FRI/PCI/BMI/OPI). Implements 156 production-ready validation rules with
spatial mapping integration. Supports CSV and Shapefile ZIP upload, severity-colored
centroid mapping, and both an interactive Shiny app and a PowerShell batch mode.

**Tech:** R, Shiny, Leaflet, PowerShell  
**Version:** 6.2 (March 2026)  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/logic-checker-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/logic-checker-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo

---

### FRI LiDAR Toolkit

![](images/screenshots/fri-lidar.png)

**Description:**  
R-based toolkit for processing and visualizing LiDAR-derived datasets from
Ontario's FRI Leaf-ON LiDAR program. Features batch CHM tile download from
Ontario GeoHub, virtual mosaic clipping (no ArcGIS), side-by-side FRI vs LiDAR
comparison, crown delineation, and 3D point cloud visualization via WebGL.

**Tech:** R, Shiny, terra, lidR, WebGL  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/fri-lidar-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/fri-lidar-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo

---

## R Pipeline Frameworks

### SLYM Companion — Stand Level Yield Curve Modeling Suite

![](images/screenshots/slym.png)

**Description:**  
An integrated suite of four specialized tools for yield curve modeling and result
processing: SLYM Processor, SLYM Runner, SLYM Auto Runner, and SLYM Cutter.
Covers model parameter setup, batch execution, and output visualization. Managed
template preparation (FGS/PRSNT subsetting, SI imputation, BA enrichment) is
handled upstream by FRI DataKit.

**Tech:** R, Shiny, PowerShell  
**Live Demo — SLYM Visualization and Reporting:** [rinecology.github.io/slym-companion/slym_cutter_fastball.html](https://rinecology.github.io/slym-companion/slym_cutter_fastball.html)  
**Live Demo — SLYM-READY Data Processor:** [rinecology.github.io/slym-companion/slym_processor_fastball.html](https://rinecology.github.io/slym-companion/slym_processor_fastball.html)  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/slym-companion-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/slym-companion-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo

---

### FRI DataKit — Forest Inventory Data Preparation Suite

![](images/screenshots/fri-datakit.png)

**Description:**  
A multi-function Shiny app for forest inventory data wrangling and pre-modeling
preparation. Started as an NER managed yield curve template builder and grew into
a comprehensive toolkit: silviculture-based subsetting (FGS/PRSNT/PRSNT_NAT),
area-weighted attribute analysis, SI imputation, STKG and BA enrichment, leading
species / AU_YC parsing with hierarchical fallback logic, and multi-region forest
unit classification (NER/NWR/GLSL for SFU/FMG/PLANFU). Outputs feed directly into
SLYM managed template generation.

**Tech:** R, Shiny, YAML-driven rules  
**Version:** 0.2.0 (February 2026)  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/fri-datakit-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/fri-datakit-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo
